statement: In every magma, Equation 1406 (`x = y * (((z * w) * y) * y)`) implies Equation 1021 (`x = x * ((x * (x * x)) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0660
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z w) y) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op (op x (op x x)) y))
